debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_2
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖_[r] ≤ ‖f‖_[some p] * ‖g‖_[none]

failed_attempts:
simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have hp : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv_r
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top, inv_inj] at this
      exact this
    rw [← hp]
    calc ‖f * g‖_[p] = ‖fun a ↦ f a * g a‖_[p] := rfl
      _ ≤ ‖fun a ↦ ‖f a‖ * ‖g a‖‖_[p] := by
          apply dLpNorm_mono (fun a ↦ ?_)
          rw [norm_mul]
          exact le_refl _
      _ ≤ ‖fun a ↦ ‖f a‖ * ‖g‖_[⊤]‖_[p] := by
          apply dLpNorm_mono (fun a ↦ ?_)
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (norm_nonneg _)
          exact norm_le_dLpNorm_top g a
      _ = ‖g‖_[⊤] * ‖fun a ↦ ‖f a‖‖_[p] := by
          rw [← dLpNorm_const_smul ‖g‖_[⊤]]
          congr 1
          ext a
          simp [mul_comm]
      _ = ‖f‖_[p] * ‖g‖_[⊤] := by rw [mul_comm, dLpNorm_norm]

have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := hpqr.p_eq_r_of_q_top
    simp only [this, dLpNorm_top]
    calc ‖f * g‖_[r] ≤ ‖f‖_[r] * ‖g‖_[⊤] := dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top hr₀ f g

have hp_eq : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := hpqr.exponent_eq_of_right_top
    rw [← hp_eq]
    exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top (by simp [hp_eq, hr₀]) f g

have : r = p := by
      simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.holderTripleCondition_iff] at hpqr
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at hpqr
      exact (ENNReal.inv_eq_inv.mp hpqr).symm
    subst this
    calc ‖f * g‖_[p] ≤ ‖f * fun _ ↦ ‖g‖_[⊤]‖_[p] := by
           apply dLpNorm_mono
           intro a
           simp only [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul]
           gcongr
           exact nnnorm_le_dLpNorm_ess_sup g a
         _ = ‖f‖_[p] * ‖g‖_[⊤] := by simp [dLpNorm_mul_const, mul_comm]

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have hr : r = p := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at this
      exact (ENNReal.inv_injective this).symm
    rw [hr]
    exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLinftyNorm _ _

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have hp_eq_r : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have h := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv hr₀
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at h
      exact (ENNReal.inv_eq_inv.mp h).symm
    rw [← hp_eq_r]
    exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLinftyNorm _ _
exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top hr₀ hpqr f g

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have hp : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have h := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv_of_ne_zero (by simp : (↑p : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0) (by simp) hr₀
      simpa using h.symm
    rw [← hp]
    calc ‖f * g‖_[↑p] ≤ ‖fun a ↦ ‖f a‖ * ‖g‖_[⊤]‖_[↑p] := by
          apply dLpNorm_mono
          intro a
          simp only [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul, NNReal.norm_eq]
          gcongr
          exact dLpNorm_top_nnnorm_le g a
      _ = ‖f‖_[↑p] * ‖g‖_[⊤] := by rw [dLpNorm_mul_const]; ring

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at *
    have hp : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv_r
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at this
      exact ENNReal.inv_injective this
    rw [← hp]
    exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top _ _

rw [mul_comm f g, mul_comm ‖f‖_[↑p] ‖g‖_[⊤]]
    exact dLpNorm_mul_le ⊤ ↑p hr₀
